# A diagram

A simple commutative square:

\begin{tikzcd}
A \arrow[r, "f"] & B
\end{tikzcd}

:::{.definition}
A *widget* is an object with a distinguished arrow.
:::

:::{.theorem}
Every widget admits a unique completion.
:::

:::{.remark}
The completion is functorial.
:::
